summary: Full e2e testing of Rudralife landing page updates and form changes. All critical features working: landing page loads with all sections (stats, experts with MN/DP initials, featured section, FAQ, WhatsApp button), form Step 2 has +91 country code dropdown, Step 4 shows only City+Country (no State field in UI), form submission to /api/submissions works, admin login and dashboard working.
critical_code_review_comments: Step 4 body text search returned 'State' as false positive (React internal or other text), but UI screenshot confirms only City + Country fields are shown - no State field visible
seed_data_creation: Test submission created: Test User / test@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 - All features working. Landing page: hero shloka badge, stats (5,00,000+/90%/25+/52+), product carousel, experts (7 total including MN/DP initials), testimonials, featured (Bombay Times, Republic Bharat), FAQ, WhatsApp button - all present. Form: Step 2 has +91 dropdown, Step 4 has only City+Country, full submission flow works. Admin login works at /admin/login with admin@rudralife.com/Rudralife@2024.
